description: Letter from an unknown merchant from Alexandria, early 11th century. The writer might be from the Taharti family, maybe Yishaq b. Barhun. Describes his deep disappointment from the business and it seems that a tragedy happened to his 16-year-old son in law. He writes about prices and details about 15 ships that are on their way from the Maghreb to Alexandria. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #139) VMR
